when: The migration backfills batch and serial from inventory_code
architectural_notes: Infra: a contract on data-store state after the backfill (delimiter parse, segment 2 -> batch, segment 3 -> serial), asserted by querying the migrated rows on the paired branch. Owner: the Alembic backfill statement in the repository/migration layer; the parse rule is migration logic, never reimplemented in the boundary or domain. Cross-cutting concern: data integrity (R1), no silent corruption.

independence.rationale: AC1 tests column creation; AC2 tests that complete three-segment codes are correctly parsed and populated
